name: Metcash Limited
analysis: MTS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.1800, stop A$2.8809, target A$4.0773 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
